properties.body:
[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 101/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. N OF KOLOBRZEG
DUE TO MISSILE FIRING AREA BOUNDED BY POSITIONS:1. 54-21.95N 015-24.27E
2. 54-34.39N 015-12.60E
3. 54-34.47N 015-13.62E
4. 54-35.33N 015-18.87E
5. 54-37.33N 015-29.02E
6. 54-39.11N 015-34.38E
7. 54-40.92N 015-39.57E
8. 54-27.08N 015-52.45E
IS ANNOUNCED DANGEROUS FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY ON 2026-05-12 AND 2026-05-13 FROM 0600 TO 1500 UTC
AVOIDING THE AREA ADVISED
CANCEL THIS MSG 131500 UTC MAY
